resultList.dtldesc: Experience the luxury of living in this expansive 4 BHK villa available for sale in Alpine Woods, Sanathal, Ahmedabad. Located in a peaceful gated community, this home provides contemporary comfort, ample space, and great connectivity.Property SpecificationsThis large 4 BHK house for resale in Alpine Woods is a thoughtfully planned G2 home which combines functionality with comfort. Situated over a super area of 285 square with a carpet area of 220 square, the property is facing east direction and is Vaastu compliant, thereby providing a balanced and harmonious living space.The ground floor has a cozy living room, dining space, one bedroom, a shared western-style bathroom, and a utilitarian kitchen with an attached utility area. The first floor has two bedrooms with attached western bathrooms, each leading out to private balconies overlooking the immaculately maintained garden park and swimming pool, adding beauty to the surroundings.The second level has a fourth bedroom with an en-suite bathroom and own balcony, again with garden park views. A special store room provides useful space for storage, while the kitchen is designed for day-to-day practicality with a normal design. The interior is completed with a combination of granite, marble, and vitrified flooring, which provides the house a finished and tough base.FacilitiesThe premises are suitably fitted with simple amenities for comfortable living. Two open parking spaces are available, making it easy for residents and visitors. A 24-hour water supply is ensured by borewells. Security is provided for by a personal guard and CCTV cameras, providing security and protection for the occupants.LocalityNearby Eklavya International School, situated this Alpine Woods, Sanathal residential property strategically well-connected with daily facilities on every doorstep. The area is developed nicely with nice schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets within walking distance, and thus ideal for families. Public transport is easily accessible with regular buses and auto-rickshaws plying regularly in the locality. A bank and ATM facilities are also close by, so that all the essential amenities are accessible within reach of the property.
